chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Shamsuddin Abbasi, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D 782 of 2022: Abbas Ali Malano vs. Federation of Pakistan & others. For the Petitioner: Petitioner-in-Person. For respondents No.3&4: Mr. Asif Hussain Muhammad Nawaz Chandio, Advocate. For official Respondents: Mr. Oshaq Ali Sangi, Assistant Attorney General. Date of hearing: 08.05.2024. Date of order: 08.05.2024. ORDER Agha Faisal, J. Petitioner seeks promotion from Assistant Manager to Deputy Manager, BPS-17 to BPS-18, on the basis of a cause allegedly accruing in 2016. This petition was preferred in 2022, apparently on a cause alleged to have arisen in 2016, therefore, barred by laches. Furthermore, the relief sought is in a service matter is with respect to GENCO, admittedly devoid of statutory rules. It is also observed that an earlier petition, CP D 442 of 2018, was dismissed as withdrawn on 16.03.2022 and no case is set forth to entertain a second petition in the same matter. Under these circumstances, no case is made out for assumption of jurisdiction in this matter, hence this petition is dismissed. Judge Judge
